name: Webpage Generator — Claude AI Creates HTML, Posts to Slack
description: Takes a description of a desired webpage, uses Claude AI to generate a complete, styled HTML page, and posts the code to Slack for review and use.

source.originalName: Dynamically generate a webpage from user request using OpenAI structured output

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the generated HTML

pageDescription.description: Description of the webpage to generate (e.g. 'A landing page for an AI productivity tool with hero section, features, and pricing')

style.description: Visual style preferences (e.g. 'dark theme, minimalist', 'colorful, playful')

steps.name: Build AI prompt for webpage generation

code.source:
var prompt = 'You are an expert web developer. Generate a complete, single-file HTML page based on the following description.

PAGE DESCRIPTION: ' + $.input.pageDescription + '
STYLE: ' + ($.input.style || 'modern, clean, responsive') + '

Requirements:
- Single HTML file with embedded CSS (in <style> tags) and JS (in <script> tags)
- Responsive design that works on mobile and desktop
- Modern CSS (flexbox/grid, custom properties)
- Semantic HTML5 elements
- Accessible (proper headings, alt text, ARIA labels)
- Professional typography and spacing
- Include realistic placeholder content (not lorem ipsum)
- Use a cohesive color scheme

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "html": "The complete HTML code",
  "title": "Page title",
  "description": "Brief description of what was generated",
  "features": ["feature1", "feature2"],
  "lineCount": 0
}';
return { prompt };

steps.name: Run Claude AI to generate the webpage
Parse AI response and strip fences
Prepare HTML and summary for Slack
Build Slack Block Kit message with HTML code
